scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && npm run dev -w apps/desktop"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,web,electron,ml -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 && npm run dev -w apps/desktop" "python packages/ml/start_ml.py"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db-mongo && npm run build -w packages/db-postgres && npm run build -w packages/rag
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.pm2:stop: pm2 stop rvl-backend rvl-ngrok rvl-localtunnel || true
